Off Calendar May-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EBEN GOSSAGE'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE DEFAULT (CCP 473).
APPEARANCES: Linda Chan, Esq. 626/229-9611 specially appearing for John D. Guerrini, Esq. of The Guerrini Law Firm for pltf & opposing party (did not give notice to the other side of their intent to appear at the hearing to argue); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PAY $1,000.00 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AS PENALTY PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473(c)(1)(A). DEFENDANT GRANTED 5 DAYS LEAVE TO FILE AND SERVE ANSWER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW/JW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
